summary: Verified 3 health endpoint aliases (/api/health, /health, /healthz) plus regression on login + core endpoints. All 9 pytest tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py `_health()` is a plain async function returning a dict — no DB call, no external dep. Correct and cheap for high-frequency polling.
/api/health registered via api.add_api_route (api = APIRouter(prefix='/api')). /health and /healthz registered on app directly with include_in_schema=False. Matches spec.
Route count = 61 (>58), FastAPI imports cleanly with minimal env vars.
requirements.txt confirmed clean of jq and emergentintegrations.
test_credentials: Owner admin@independentmedia.hub/Admin2026! and Rep victor.laurent@parismedia.fr/Rep2026! — both login OK.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Note: on the Emergent preview ingress, only /api/* routes reach the backend. Public URL GET /health and /healthz return frontend HTML (index.html served by React), NOT the backend JSON. This is EXPECTED — in Coolify production, nginx.conf inside the container proxies /health and /healthz directly to uvicorn:8001. To verify /health and /healthz responses in this env, hit http://127.0.0.1:8001/health directly (all 3 aliases confirmed 200 with correct JSON on the backend itself).
